title: Dekton 50MM Closed Shackle Padlock | Hardened Steel Shackle |Minimal Shackle to Prevent Bolt Cutter & Saw Attacks | Ideal for Residential & Commercial Property, Lockers, Luggage | Includes 2 Keys
features: Closed Shackle Design for Maximum Security: The Dekton 50MM Closed Shackle Padlock is engineered to expose as little of the shackle as possible, significantly reducing the risk of attacks with bolt cutters and saws. This design enhances the overall security and durability, making it ideal for high-risk areas.

Hardened Steel Shackle: The padlock’s hardened steel shackle provides excellent protection against cutting, sawing, and other tampering attempts. It’s designed for long-lasting performance and is suitable for securing gates, doors, lockers, and more.

Heavy-Duty Construction for Outdoor Use: Built to withstand harsh weather conditions, this padlock is perfect for outdoor applications. Its weather-resistant design ensures reliable protection against rain, rust, and extreme temperatures, making it ideal for securing property outdoors.

Versatile Security Applications: Whether you need to secure residential or commercial property, lockers, or luggage, this closed shackle padlock is versatile enough for various security needs. It offers an excellent level of protection for both indoor and outdoor use.

Includes 2 Steel Keys for Convenient Access: The Dekton Closed Shackle Padlock comes with two durable steel keys, ensuring easy and reliable access. The extra key provides added convenience, allowing you to share access or have a backup in case of emergencies.
description: From the manufacturer 50MM CLOSED SHACKLE HIGH SECURITY PADLOCK Ideal for outdoor use. Designed to expose as little of the shackle as possible, making it more difficult to attack with bolt cutters and saws. Suitable for securing residential/commercial property, lockers and luggage. Hardened steel shackle, providing an excellent level of security. ADVANCED LEVEL OF SECURITY HARDENED STEEL CLOSED SHACKLE Designed to withstand attack from bolt cutters. Excellent anti-cut resistance. Heat treated to be harder, safer and cut resistant. EXCELLENT LEVEL OF SECURITY Brass cylinder locking mechanism. Protects against rust. SECURITY KEYS Supplied with 2 security keys for an added level of security against attack. Standard sizes include: 40mm, 50mm and 60mm. IDEAL FOR SECURING Residential / Commercial property.
